column3: "Fo Ti lowers blood pressure" refers to its ability to regulate or control the amount of force that blood exerts on the walls of blood vessels, helping maintain a healthy balance.
"Fo Ti promotes heart health" refers to its ability to boost cardiovascular functions and enhance overall well-being.
"Fo Ti improves digestion" refers to its ability to help the body break down food effectively during the digestive process, improving nutrient absorption and overall gastrointestinal health.
"Fo Ti reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and redness caused by irritated body tissues.
"Fo Ti boosts immunity" refers to its ability to enhance the body's natural defense system against various ailments, illnesses, and health challenges.
"Fo Ti prevents cancer" refers to its ability to fight against tumor growth and reduce the risk of certain cancers.
"Fo Ti enhances brain function" refers to its ability to improve mental alertness, cognitive processing, and memory capacity by supporting optimal neuronal communication.

"Fo Ti regulates blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to help balance insulin sensitivity, which in turn aids in managing blood 
         sugar and preventing drastic fluctuations.
"Fo Ti promotes healthy skin" refers to its ability to enhance the overall skin's wellbeing, improving texture and appearance.
"Fo Ti alleviates pain and inflammation" refers to its ability to help relieve symptoms such as muscle discomfort and swelling due to various conditions.
